news.t: American Beacon Advisors Partners With Man AHL to Launch Firm's First ETF

overview.description: The American Beacon AHL Trend ETF (AHLT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund seeks capital growth through a systematic, trend-following, managed futures strategy. Using technical analysis, the fund actively manages a wide range of derivatives linked to commodities, stocks indexes, currencies, bonds and interest rates. AHLT was launched on Aug 30, 2023 and is issued by American Beacon.

data.title: American Beacon Advisors Partners With Man AHL to Launch Firm's First ETF
data.text: IRVING, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--American Beacon Advisors, Inc. has launched its first exchange-traded fund, the American Beacon AHL Trend ETF, in addition to its latest mutual fund.
